structurePatterns: Selected segment = white background — NOT blue fill
Segments separated by 2px gap (no visible divider lines)
usageHints: Use for mutually exclusive view modes (list/grid, day/week/month)
Best for 2-4 segments — more should use dropdown menu
Active segment is WHITE card, not blue
doNotInvent: Blue selected segment — selected = white, not blue
Divider lines between segments — use gap instead
Square corners on container — use md radius
